title: ranunculus eschscholtzii var. trisectus
intro: Ranunculus eschscholtzii var. trisectus, also known as Three-leaved Buttercup, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. It has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the Three-leaved Buttercup can be used as a tincture, tea, or infusible oil to take advantage of its potential medicinal properties.
